props.description: Content to be rendered inside the Nav element.
props.title: children

props.description:
Visual variant of the button.
"ai-generative" renders a fixed AI icon with a gradient border and does not accept a custom `icon`.
props.title: appearance

props.description: Icon element to be rendered inside the button. Ignored when `appearance` is "ai-generative".
props.title: icon

props.description: Controls whether the button is active or not.
props.title: active

props.description: Displays a small badge on top of the button.
props.title: badge
